ddls:
CREATE TABLE "buildings" (
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building */,
  "building_name" TEXT /* Name of the building */,
  "building_type" TEXT /* Type of the building (e.g., office, laboratory, residential) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the building */,
  "building_area" REAL /* Total area of the building (in square meters) */,
  "building_volume" REAL /* Total volume of the building (in cubic meters) */,
  "construction_year" INTEGER /* Year the building was constructed */,
  "occupancy_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of people the building can accommodate */,
  "building_owner" TEXT /* Name of the building owner */,
  "building_manager" TEXT /* Name of the building manager */,
  "building_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the building */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zones" (
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zone */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building the zone belongs to */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the zone */,
  "zone_type" TEXT /* Type of the zone (e.g., room, corridor) */,
  "zone_area" REAL /* Area of the zone (in square meters) */,
  "zone_volume" REAL /* Volume of the zone (in cubic meters) */,
  "occupancy_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of people the zone can accommodate */,
  "zone_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the zone */,
  "zone_elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the zone (in meters) relative to the ground level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zones_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thermal_comfort_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the zone the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., air velocity, radiant temperature) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., m/s, °C) */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the metric */,
  "metric_range" TEXT /* Range of values the metric can take */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the zone the simulation belongs to */,
  "simulation_date" TEXT /* Date the simulation was run */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being simulated */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the simulated metric */,
  "simulation_type" TEXT /* Type of simulation (e.g., steady-state, transient) */,
  "simulation_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the simulation (in hours) */,
  "simulation_status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "simulation_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the simulation */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES thermal_comfort_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "people" (
  "person_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each person */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the zone the person occupies */,
  "activity_schedule" TEXT /* Activity schedule of the person (e.g., sitting, standing) */,
  "clothing_efficiency" REAL /* Clothing efficiency of the person */,
  "person_name" TEXT /* Name of the person */,
  "person_role" TEXT /* Role of the person (e.g., architect, engineer, building owner) */,
  "person_email" TEXT /* Email address of the person */,
  "person_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the person */,
  "person_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("person_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_people_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "person_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person the schedule belongs to */,
  "schedule_name" TEXT /* Name of the schedule */,
  "schedule_type" TEXT /* Type of the schedule (e.g., hourly, daily) */,
  "schedule_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the schedule */,
  "schedule_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the schedule */,
  "schedule_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the schedule (e.g., every day, every hour) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_schedules_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("person_id") REFERENCES people ("person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_efficiencies" (
  "efficiency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each efficiency */,
  "person_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person the efficiency belongs to */,
  "efficiency_name" TEXT /* Name of the efficiency */,
  "efficiency_value" REAL /* Value of the efficiency */,
  "efficiency_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the efficiency */,
  "efficiency_category" TEXT /* Category of the efficiency (e.g., summer, winter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("efficiency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_efficiencies_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("person_id") REFERENCES people ("person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "air_velocity_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the zone the schedule belongs to */,
  "schedule_name" TEXT /* Name of the schedule */,
  "schedule_type" TEXT /* Type of the schedule (e.g., hourly, daily) */,
  "schedule_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the schedule */,
  "schedule_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the schedule */,
  "schedule_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the schedule (e.g., every day, every hour) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_velocity_schedules_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "radiant_temperature_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the zone the schedule belongs to */,
  "schedule_name" TEXT /* Name of the schedule */,
  "schedule_type" TEXT /* Type of the schedule (e.g., hourly, daily) */,
  "schedule_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the schedule */,
  "schedule_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the schedule */,
  "schedule_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the schedule (e.g., every day, every hour) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_radiant_temperature_schedules_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mrt_calculation_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the zone the type belongs to */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type (e.g., Area-weighted, Point-based) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the type */,
  "type_method" TEXT /* Method used for the MRT calculation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mrt_calculation_types_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surface_indexes" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the zone the index belongs to */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the index */,
  "index_value" REAL /* Value of the index */,
  "index_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the index */,
  "index_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surface_indexes_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "angle_factor_lists" (
  "list_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each list */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the zone the list belongs to */,
  "list_name" TEXT /* Name of the list */,
  "list_value" REAL /* Value of the list */,
  "list_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the list */,
  "list_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the angle factors */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("list_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_angle_factor_lists_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warnings" (
  "warning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warning */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the zone the warning belongs to */,
  "warning_name" TEXT /* Name of the warning */,
  "warning_description" TEXT /* Description of the warning */,
  "warning_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the warning (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "warning_action" TEXT /* Recommended action to address the warning */,
  "warning_status" TEXT /* Status of the warning (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warnings_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id")
)
